name: @blueconic/blueconic-mcp
description: BlueConic Client-Side MCP Server - Dynamic multi-tenant OpenAPI adapter for providing context to AI models

scripts.publish-snapshot: npm version prerelease --preid SNAPSHOT && npm run build && npm test && npm i && npm publish --tag snapshot
scripts.publish-release: npm version patch && npm run build && npm test && npm i && npm publish --tag latest
scripts.test:mcpb: npm run build:mcpb && npm run check:mcpb
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:mcpb
scripts.validate:mcpb: npm run build:mcpb && npm run check:mcpb && mcpb validate .
scripts.pack:mcpb: npm run build:mcpb && npm run check:mcpb && mcpb pack . dist/blueconic-mcp.mcpb

author: BlueConic
